artPrompt: An evocative frozen-time scene of a doomsday clock tower's hand suspended a hair from midnight, held back by a single fragile thread of cold gold light. Below, ashen-robed figures stand utterly motionless in a candlelit street, ash hanging unmoving in the air, the blood-dark sky paused mid-collapse, a precarious held breath of a world, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Until Your Next Snack, the World Holds
text:
For as long as nobody at the table eats a snack, the Doomsday Clock cannot reach midnight and creatures can't attack you. The world is on pause, held together by sheer hunger.
The moment any player eats a snack, sacrifice Until Your Next Snack, the World Holds: put four doom counters on the Doomsday Clock all at once and the pause ends with a crunch. You had ONE job.
flavorText: "Do NOT open the chips. I am begging you. The chips are load-bearing."
